author: y4rr
content: Decision: JPEG tolerance bound set at MAE < 0.1 (tensor, float) and MAE < 20 (u8, raw). These are conservative — real JPEG quality-75 typically produces MAE ~5-15 in u8. Raw tensor binary uses little-endian f32/f64 layout, which is the natural ferrotorch in-memory format. Added 4 new tests: write_tensor_as_jpeg_roundtrip_lossy_tolerance, write_image_as_jpeg_roundtrip_lossy_tolerance, raw_tensor_binary_roundtrip_f32, raw_tensor_binary_roundtrip_f64.
